sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Otis Worldwide Corp. stock (US68902V1070): Why does its elevator dominance matter more now for investors?
feed.summary: Otis Worldwide Corp. leads the global elevator and escalator market, offering stable returns and long-term growth for investors due to its essential role in urban development. The company benefits from a dual-revenue model combining new equipment sales with high-margin, long-term service contracts, which provides resilience against economic fluctuations and supports continuous innovation in digital services. Despite potential risks from construction slowdowns and geopolitical tensions, Otis's strong competitive position, global reach, and focus on sustainable and smart technology make it an attractive defensive growth play for diversified portfolios.

feed.title: RadNet, Inc. Announces Date of its First Quarter 2026 Financial Results Conference Call
feed.summary: RadNet, Inc. (NASDAQ: RDNT) announced it will host a conference call on Monday, May 11, 2026, at 7:30 a.m. Pacific Time to discuss its first quarter 2026 financial results. Investors can listen by dialing specified numbers or via webcast. The company is a national leader in diagnostic imaging services and digital health solutions.

feed.title: CMS Energy: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: CMS Energy Corp. (CMS) reported strong first-quarter earnings, with net income reaching $340 million, or $1.10 per share. Adjusted earnings of $1.13 per share and revenue of $2.73 billion both surpassed Wall Street expectations. The company also provided a full-year earnings forecast in the range of $3.83 to $3.90 per share.

feed.title: Gilead Sciences Completes Acquisition of Arcellx and Anito-cel
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences has completed its $7.8 billion acquisition of Arcellx, gaining full control over anito-cel, an investigational CAR T-cell therapy for multiple myeloma. The deal, structured as an asset acquisition with cash and contingent value rights, integrates anito-cel into Kite Oncology while eliminating future profit-sharing and royalty obligations. While expected to dilute Gilead's earnings in 2026-2027, the acquisition is projected to become accretive from 2028 if anito-cel secures regulatory approval and commercial success.

feed.title: Wells Fargo & Company Announces Common Stock Dividend
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company announced that its board of directors has approved a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.45 per share. This dividend is payable on June 1, 2026, to stockholders of record as of May 8, 2026. Wells Fargo is a leading financial services company with approximately $2.2 trillion in assets, offering a diversified set of banking, investment, and mortgage products and services.

feed.title: Wells Fargo (WFC) Declares $0.45 Quarterly Dividend; 2.2% Yield
feed.summary: Wells Fargo (NYSE: WFC) has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.45 per share, amounting to an annualized dividend of $1.8, which represents a 2.2% annual yield. The dividend is set to be paid on June 1, 2026, to shareholders recorded by May 8, 2026, with the ex-dividend date on May 7, 2026. Despite this dividend declaration, the overall analyst rating for WFC is currently "SELL".

feed.title: NSC Maintained by Baird -- Price Target Raised to $330
feed.summary: Baird has maintained a Neutral rating on Norfolk Southern (NSC) but raised its price target from $315 to $330. Despite strong fundamentals indicated by a GF Score of 85/100, GuruFocus calculates NSC as 27.2% overvalued with a current price of $318.89 against a GF Value of $250.75, suggesting caution for potential investors.

feed.title: PACCAR's revenue falls on tepid demand for new trucks
feed.summary: PACCAR reported a decline in first-quarter revenue due to soft demand for new trucks, exacerbated by higher fuel costs impacting the trucking industry's recovery. While truck deliveries and sales were down, the aftermarket parts business saw a slight increase as older vehicles stayed on the road longer. The company's total quarterly revenue decreased compared to the previous year, though per-share profit rose.

feed.title: General Motors earns more than $2.6 billion in first quarter of 2026
feed.summary: General Motors (GM) reported first-quarter earnings of $2.63 billion, or $2.82 per share, exceeding analyst expectations for earnings but falling short on revenue. The Detroit-based automotive manufacturer posted adjusted earnings of $3.70 per share and revenue of $43.62 billion, compared to an expected $43.94 billion. GM anticipates full-year earnings to be in the range of $11.50 to $13.50 per share.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams posts increases across the board in Q1
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams reported strong financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026, with consolidated net sales increasing 6.8% to $5.67 billion. The company saw diluted net income per share rise by 7.5% to $2.15 and net income increase by 6.1% to $534.7 million. Despite global uncertainties, Sherwin-Williams exceeded sales guidance across all segments and reaffirmed its full-year 2026 financial guidance.

feed.title: 50,382 Shares in Kraft Heinz Company $KHC Bought by Westhampton Capital LLC
feed.summary: Westhampton Capital LLC recently acquired 50,382 shares of Kraft Heinz Company (NASDAQ:KHC) valued at approximately $1.22 million during the fourth quarter. Analysts generally hold a cautious outlook, with an average "Reduce" rating and a consensus target price of $23.47. Kraft Heinz currently offers a significant quarterly dividend of $0.40 per share, yielding 7.3%, and has provided FY2026 EPS guidance between $1.98 and $2.10.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Adjusts NetApp Price Target to $88 From $89, Maintains Underweight Rating
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has revised its price target for NetApp (NASDAQ: NTAP) shares down to $88 from $89, while reiterating an "Underweight" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a slightly more cautious outlook from the investment bank on the company's future performance.

feed.title: Arista Networks Q1 Earnings Preview: AI Momentum Meets A High Bar (NYSE:ANET)
feed.summary: Arista Networks (ANET) is discussed as a strong AI infrastructure investment due to its Ethernet-based networking solutions and hyperscale demand. The company faces high expectations for its Q1 2026 earnings, with consensus revenue at $2.62 billion and EPS of $0.81. Despite a stretched valuation (forward P/E ~50x, EV/sales 18.5x), the market anticipates flawless execution and sustained leadership, making the stock susceptible to sharp de-rating if performance disappoints.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Adjusts Price Target on Kroger to $73 From $67, Maintains Equalweight Rating
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has increased its price target on Kroger (NYSE: KR) to $73 from $67, while maintaining an "Equalweight" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes as Kroger's stock performance shows a 5.47% increase year-to-date, reflecting investor confidence despite a slight daily dip. The company, a major food products distributor in America, continues to be a focus for analysts tracking the retail sector.

feed.title: RedCloud Unveils Specialist AI Agents Trained on $6.9 Billion FMCG Trade Dataset — Targeted to Improve Thousands of Commercial Decisions Daily
feed.summary: RedCloud Holdings plc (Nasdaq: RCT) announced the introduction of three specialist AI agents within its RedAI platform, designed to automate high-frequency, high-value decisions across FMCG supply chains. These agents, powered by RedAI’s RAID Engine and trained on $6.9 billion in proprietary FMCG transactional data, aim to address an estimated $2 trillion annual market opportunity by providing data-driven recommendations and semi-autonomous actions. The agents—RedAI Inventory Agent, RedAI Sales Agent, and RedAI Market Planning Agent—are expected to roll out in H2 2026, improving efficiency, reducing stockouts, and enhancing sales performance for FMCG and distribution professionals.

feed.title: $6.9B trade dataset powers RedCloud's planned FMCG AI agents
feed.summary: RedCloud (Nasdaq: RCT) announced three new specialist AI agents for its RedAI platform, designed to optimize inventory, sales, and market planning in FMCG supply chains. These agents are trained on a proprietary $6.9 billion transactional dataset and are expected to be rolled out to customers in phases during the second half of 2026. The company estimates these AI solutions can recover $2 trillion annually in lost inventory opportunity within the global FMCG industry.

feed.title: Domino’s expects Papa Johns, Pizza Hut to close more stores
feed.summary: Domino's CEO Russell Weiner predicts that Papa Johns and Pizza Hut will experience further store closures due to profitability issues stemming from their deep discounting strategies. Domino's aims to grow its market share by focusing on its long-term value strategy and higher advertising budget, which allows its franchisees to maintain strong margins and sales volumes. The company expects to continue its growth by leveraging competitor closures and its proven formula of increasing sales, stores, and profits.

feed.title: Generac’s $700 Million Data Center Backlog Is Building the Case for a $250 Price Target
feed.summary: Generac Holdings (GNRC) is at a structural turning point, driven by strong demand from data center operators, which is redefining its long-term earnings potential. The company's C&I division backlog grew from $400 million to $700 million, with a nonbinding notice to proceed for over $600 million from a hyperscaler. This significant data center momentum suggests a potential upside for Generac stock despite residential sales declines, with analysts targeting a mean price of $249 and TIKR's model suggesting $293 by Dec. 2030.

feed.title: Freeport-McMoran Beat Q1 2026 Earnings. Why Is the Stock Still Under $61?
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) exceeded Q1 2026 earnings expectations significantly, with beats on EPS, revenue, and EBITDA. Despite the strong financial performance, the stock closed down 0.70% due to a guidance cut stemming from production issues at its Grasberg mine in Indonesia. The company attributes this to a temporary material handling bottleneck caused by increased wet ore, with a fix expected by mid-2027 and the issue representing deferred rather than lost production.

feed.title: Autonomous Research Adjusts Raymond James Financial PT to $180 From $189, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Autonomous Research has adjusted its price target for Raymond James Financial to $180, down from $189, while reiterating a "Neutral" rating. This update reflects the analyst's revised outlook on the financial services firm. The article also notes other recent analyst adjustments for Raymond James Financial from firms like Argus Research, Morgan Stanley, UBS, Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan, BMO Capital, Barclays, Jefferies & Co, and TD Cowen.

feed.title: Tyler Technologies to Participate in May and June Investor Conferences
feed.summary: Tyler Technologies (NYSE: TYL) announced it will be participating in two investor conferences in May and June 2026. Brian Miller, executive vice president and chief financial officer, will represent the company at the 54th Annual J.P. Morgan Global Technology, Media, and Communications Conference and the D.A. Davidson Annual Technology & Consumer Conference. Live webcasts of the fireside chats will be available on the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Adjusts Price Target on Huntington Bancshares to $20 From $21, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has adjusted its price target on Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) to $20, down from $21, while maintaining an Overweight rating on the stock. This update reflects a minor change in the firm's outlook for the bank. Concurrently, Jefferies also recently updated its price target for Huntington Bancshares to $20 from $19, maintaining a Buy rating.

feed.title: Assessing Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback And Growth Update
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) has experienced a mixed share performance recently, with an 8.4% decline over the past year despite double-digit annual revenue and net income growth. The article explores whether this pullback presents a buying opportunity, noting a fair value estimate of $532.46, suggesting an 11.5% undervaluation based on projected growth in revenue and profit margins. However, it also highlights valuation risks due to high P/E multiples compared to the industry and peers.

feed.title: JPMorgan to become global partner of 2028 Olympics, 2030 Winter Games
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase has announced a partnership with the International Olympic Committee, becoming the first bank to be a global partner of the Olympics. This collaboration includes the Los Angeles 2028 Olympic and Paralympic Games and the French Alps 2030 Winter Games. JPMorgan will also be the official bank of the U.S. Olympic team at the LA28 Games and a founding partner for the event, offering financial health workshops for athletes.

feed.title: Supermicro Expands Data Center Building Block Solutions® Flexibility with Arm-Based Platforms and OCP Systems for Next-Gen AI Infrastructure
feed.summary: Supermicro has expanded its Data Center Building Block Solutions (DCBBS) with new Arm AGI CPU-based server platforms and Open Compute Project (OCP) ORv3-compliant rack offerings. These new systems aim to maximize performance-per-watt and accelerate AI adoption across cloud and enterprise environments through high-density, liquid-cooled, and energy-efficient Arm architectures. The enhanced portfolio includes a 2U GPU system compatible with OCP ORv3 racks, a high-density FlexTwin system, and new Arm AGI CPU-based systems in 2U and 5U form factors.

feed.title: PPG Industries Inc. stock (US6935061076): Is its coatings leadership strong enough to unlock new ups
feed.summary: This article examines PPG Industries Inc.'s potential for sustained growth, highlighting its leadership in paints, coatings, and specialty materials. It discusses the company's core business model, product innovation, market drivers, and relevance for investors in the United States and English-speaking markets, while also addressing key risks and analyst views. The company's focus on innovation, sustainability, and a diversified business model positions it well for navigating industry shifts and delivering long-term value.

feed.title: PRF Technologies Wins FDA IND Clearance for OcuRing-K Phase II Cataract Trial
feed.summary: PRF Technologies has received FDA IND clearance for OcuRing-K, a sustained-release ketorolac ring, allowing it to proceed to a U.S. Phase II clinical trial for post-cataract pain and inflammation. This development, leveraging LayerBio's ocular platform, aims to simplify recovery and improve adherence for cataract surgery patients. The company plans to launch the multi-center trial with patient enrollment targeted for the second half of 2026, advancing its ophthalmic strategy alongside its DeepSolar energy platform.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (BEN) Franklin Resources, Inc. Posts Q2 Adjusted EPS $0.71 per Share, vs. FactSet Est of $0.55
feed.summary: Franklin Resources, Inc. (BEN) significantly surpassed analyst expectations in its fiscal Q2 earnings. The company reported an adjusted EPS of $0.71 per share, notably higher than the FactSet estimate of $0.55 per share. Additionally, Franklin Resources' Q2 revenue reached $2.29 billion, also exceeding the FactSet estimate of $1.70 billion.

feed.title: Lost Money on Gartner, Inc. (IT)? Join Class Action Suit Seeking Recovery - Contact The Gross Law Firm
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm is encouraging shareholders of Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) who purchased shares between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026, to join a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Gartner made misleading statements about its growth rates and ability to meet consulting revenue targets, leading to significant stock price declines on two separate occasions in 2025 and 2026. The deadline to seek lead plaintiff appointment is May 18, 2026.

feed.title: Husqvarna Engages Octane and Huntington Bank to Deliver Innovative Financing Experience to Dealers and Customers
feed.summary: Husqvarna has partnered with Octane and The Huntington National Bank to provide an innovative, full-spectrum financing and technology experience for its outdoor power equipment to dealerships and customers. The "Huntington Bank Powered by Octane" program will streamline the sales and financing process through a single platform, offering prime options via Huntington and near-prime financing through Octane's Roadrunner Financial. This collaboration aims to enhance the buying experience for both dealers and customers with fast credit decisions and simplified loan management.

feed.title: VICI Properties Q1 2026 Earnings Preview — April 30, Street Expects $0.71 EPS
feed.summary: Wall Street analysts are projecting VICI Properties will report Q1 2026 earnings per share of $0.71 on revenue of $1.02 billion. This represents a significant 39.2% year-over-year EPS growth and a 3.6% revenue increase. Investors will be keenly watching tenant lease coverage ratios, acquisition pipeline commentary, and updated full-year AFFO guidance, as these factors will be critical for assessing the REIT's income stream sustainability and dividend outlook.

feed.title: Business internet gets 99.99% uptime guarantee and Starlink backup
feed.summary: T-Mobile has launched SuperBroadband, a new business internet solution combining its 5G Advanced network with Starlink Broadband to offer enhanced redundancy, nationwide coverage, and simplified operations for businesses. This service provides a 99.99% uptime guarantee and aims to resolve issues like inconsistent reliability and limited coverage that plague traditional business internet solutions. SuperBroadband offers a fully managed service with a single contract and bill, supported by end-to-end assistance from T-Mobile for Business.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Adjusts DuPont de Nemours Price Target to $52 From $44, Maintains Equal Weight Rating
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has increased its price target for DuPont de Nemours (NYSE: DD) to $52, up from $44, while maintaining an "Equal Weight" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook for the specialty chemicals manufacturer. Simultaneously, RBC also adjusted its price target for DuPont de Nemours to $56 from $60, maintaining an "Outperform" rating on April 24, 2026, indicating varied analyst perspectives on the company's valuation.

feed.title: Provident Financial Services (PFS) Q1 2026 Preview: EPS Est. $0.55, Reports April 30
feed.summary: Provident Financial Services (PFS) is expected to report Q1 2026 earnings of $0.55 per share on revenue of $225.2 million, according to Wall Street analysts. This forecast represents a 12.2% year-over-year EPS increase. The regional bank is set to release its results on April 30, with key investor focus on net interest margin, loan growth composition, credit quality, and deposit trends.

feed.title: Kimberly-Clark Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Kimberly-Clark reported solid Q1 2026 organic sales growth, driven by innovation in baby care, women's health, and active aging, with volume and mix up 3%. While facing potential headwinds from rising commodity costs like oil, the company maintains its full-year guidance, planning to offset these through strategic pricing, productivity improvements, and supply chain efficiencies. Management expressed strong confidence in their ability to manage through turbulent environments, emphasizing their integrated margin management approach and market share gains, partly due to improvements in their cost management capabilities.

feed.title: Invitation Homes Q1 2026 Earnings Preview — April 30, Street Expects $0.15 EPS
feed.summary: Wall Street analysts anticipate modest growth for Invitation Homes, with an expected EPS of $0.15 and revenue of $687.0M for Q1 2026, though this represents a significant year-over-year earnings decline. The report highlights potential challenges in operating expenses, interest costs, and property-level headwinds. Investors are advised to focus on same-store revenue growth, occupancy rates, and management's commentary on operational trends to assess the company's performance.

feed.title: T-Mobile Reinvents Business Internet from the Ground Up and the Sky Down with ‘SuperBroadband’
feed.summary: T-Mobile has launched SuperBroadband, a new business internet solution integrating its 5G Advanced network with Starlink Broadband. This offering provides ultimate redundancy, unmatched coverage across every U.S. ZIP code, and unprecedented simplicity through a single managed service. SuperBroadband aims to solve common business internet issues like inconsistent reliability and limited coverage, ensuring virtually unbreakable connectivity for businesses of all sizes.

feed.title: T-Mobile expands fiber in Northeast and Midwest, reaching 1M more homes
feed.summary: T-Mobile has announced two strategic fiber joint ventures to significantly expand its fiber-to-the-premises (FTTP) footprint, aiming to reach over 1 million additional homes across the Northeastern and Midwestern U.S. These JVs, one with Oak Hill Capital to integrate GoNetspeed and Greenlight Networks, and another with Wren House to acquire i3 Broadband, bolster T-Mobile's broadband portfolio alongside its 5G fixed wireless access offering. The transactions are expected to close in 2026 and 2027, with T-Mobile investing approximately $2.7 billion in total.

feed.title: Hilton Reports Q1 2026 Results
feed.summary: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, with diluted EPS of $1.66 and Adjusted EBITDA of $901 million. The company saw a 3.6 percent increase in system-wide comparable RevPAR and added 16,300 rooms to its system. Hilton also launched a new brand, Select by Hilton, and repurchased $860 million in common stock during the quarter.

feed.title: Supermicro Expands Data Center Building Block Solutions® Flexibility with Arm-Based Platforms and OCP Systems for Next-Gen AI Infrastructure
feed.summary: Supermicro has expanded its Data Center Building Block Solutions (DCBBS) portfolio by introducing new Arm-based server platforms and Open Compute Project (OCP) ORv3-compliant rack offerings. These new solutions aim to enhance performance per watt, accelerate AI adoption, and provide scalable, flexible infrastructure for next-generation AI and HPC workloads. The expanded portfolio includes high-density liquid-cooled systems and energy-efficient Arm architectures, supporting agentic AI across cloud and enterprise environments.

feed.title: Takeda takes U.S. rights to rusfertide; Protagonist eligible for $475M
feed.summary: Protagonist Therapeutics (Nasdaq:PTGX) has exercised its U.S. opt-out right for rusfertide under its collaboration with Takeda, making it eligible for up to $475 million in payments tied to the election and FDA approval, plus up to $975 million in milestones and tiered worldwide royalties of 14%-29%. This strategic move shifts exclusive U.S. development and commercialization rights to Takeda, while providing Protagonist with substantial non-dilutive cash and long-term economic participation. Rusfertide is currently under FDA Priority Review for polycythemia vera, with a PDUFA target action date in Q3 2026.

feed.title: Barrick picks New York for gold spinoff later this year
feed.summary: Barrick Mining Corp. plans to list its North American operations in New York with a secondary listing in Toronto, aiming to complete the IPO by year-end. This spinoff, potentially worth over US$60 billion, will separate its North American assets from operations in riskier jurisdictions and follows a period of declining output and management changes. The new entity will include Barrick's interests in joint ventures with Newmont Corp. in Nevada and the Dominican Republic.

feed.title: RELX Group Enters into an Agreement to Acquire Doctrine
feed.summary: RELX Group, owner of LexisNexis Legal & Professional, has announced a put option agreement to acquire Doctrine, a leading legal AI platform in Continental Europe. This acquisition aims to accelerate the delivery of enhanced legal AI workflow solutions across France, Germany, Spain, and Italy, providing legal professionals with end-to-end AI-powered tools. Doctrine will continue to operate under its existing management team as part of RELX Group, pending regulatory approvals.

feed.title: Southwest showcases Independence One to mark 250 years since founding of the US
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines has unveiled 'Independence One,' a new Boeing 737 MAX 8 with a special livery, alongside a revamped 'Liberty One,' to commemorate the 250th anniversary of the United States. These aircraft, painted in red, white, and blue with patriotic messages, celebrate an important milestone in US history and the airline's role in connecting communities. Independence One will begin its scheduled flights on April 29, 2026, from Dallas to Philadelphia, the birthplace of American independence.

feed.title: Vest Financial LLC Has $49.41 Million Stock Holdings in General Dynamics Corporation $GD
feed.summary: Vest Financial LLC reduced its stake in General Dynamics Corporation (NYSE:GD) by 16.3% in the fourth quarter, now owning 146,756 shares valued at $49.41 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings, with Vanguard Group and Ameriprise Financial significantly increasing their stakes. General Dynamics recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and increased its quarterly dividend to $1.59 per share.

feed.title: Vest Financial LLC Raises Position in FactSet Research Systems Inc. $FDS
feed.summary: Vest Financial LLC significantly increased its stake in FactSet Research Systems Inc. (NYSE:FDS) by 30.8% in the fourth quarter, now owning 170,147 shares valued at $49.375 million. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their holdings in the business services provider. The article also details recent analyst ratings which generally have a "Reduce" average, with an average target price of $279.85, and reports on FactSet's recent earnings beat and dividend announcement.

feed.title: Dover Corporation $DOV is Vest Financial LLC's 8th Largest Position
feed.summary: Vest Financial LLC significantly increased its stake in Dover Corporation (NYSE:DOV) by 23.4% in the fourth quarter, making it their 8th largest holding. Several other institutional investors also adjusted their positions, and Wall Street analysts have issued mostly "Buy" ratings for Dover, projecting growth. The company recently reported its quarterly earnings, beating EPS estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Vest Financial LLC Acquires 15,340 Shares of Snap-On Incorporated $SNA
feed.summary: Vest Financial LLC increased its stake in Snap-On Incorporated (NYSE:SNA) by 10.2% in the fourth quarter, purchasing an additional 15,340 shares. This acquisition brings their total holdings to 165,192 shares, valued at $56.925 million. Other institutional investors like Thurston Springer Miller Herd & Titak Inc. and SJS Investment Consulting Inc. also adjusted their positions in the company, while analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $381.20.

feed.title: Vivid Wealth Management LLC Decreases Stake in Caterpillar Inc. $CAT
feed.summary: Vivid Wealth Management LLC has reduced its stake in Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) by 21.2% during the fourth quarter, now owning 4,665 shares valued at $2,672,000. Despite this, other institutional investors increased their holdings, and the company has received a "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with an average target price of $767.77. News impacting Caterpillar shows a mix of positive sentiment from upward EPS revisions and price target increases, alongside neutral sentiment regarding strategic moves and negative sentiment concerning its P/E valuation.

feed.title: Nordson Corporation $NDSN Shares Sold by Vest Financial LLC
feed.summary: Vest Financial LLC decreased its stake in Nordson Corporation (NASDAQ:NDSN) by 15.8% in Q4, selling 39,532 shares and retaining 210,670 shares valued at $50.65 million. Despite Vest Financial's sale, other institutional investors like Vanguard Group Inc. and State Street Corp significantly increased their holdings in Nordson. Company insiders also sold shares, totaling over $22.5 million in the last three months, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $311.50 for NDSN.
